analysis.summary: The song is a resolute refusal to become a destructive force for someone else's emotional dependency. It depicts the narrator setting boundaries against volatile passion and toxic love cycles while choosing to preserve their own peace.

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Defiant resolve to end the cycle

sections.name: Bridge
sections.emotion: Desperate need for proof of existence in darkness

sections.name: Drop
sections.emotion: Calm determination to stop the fire

sections.name: Pre-Chorus
sections.emotion: Rising tension against the noise of night

sections.name: Verse 3
sections.emotion: Gentle acceptance of leaving for peace

sections.name: Outro
sections.emotion: Soft hope and lingering light after the storm

keywords.imageryPrompt: A flickering orange flame casting long, trembling shadows against a wet concrete wall in the rain.
Heavy droplets running down a grimy window pane reflecting streetlights and blurred city traffic at night.

keywords.emotion: Overwhelming fear of the void inside oneself
keywords.imageryPrompt: Deep black space with faint, cold blue ambient light revealing dust motes floating in a silent room.

keywords.emotion: Heavy pressure and suffocating quiet before breaking
keywords.imageryPrompt: A stillness so thick it distorts the air around an empty chair, with shadows stretching unnaturally long.

keywords.emotion: Violent release of repressed emotional pain
keywords.imageryPrompt: Bright white lightning splitting a dark storm cloud illuminating jagged rooftops and bare trees violently swaying.

keywords.emotion: Gentle hope or the small beacon remaining after departure
keywords.imageryPrompt: A single warm yellow lamp glowing softly in a corner of an otherwise dark room, casting gentle pools on the floor.
